introSection: Hala Madrid is a wooden roller coaster located at Real Madrid World in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster was ready to operate in 2020 but its public opening was delayed several years.

The ride opened with Real Madrid World on 9 April 2024.

fullText:
Hala Madrid is a wooden roller coaster located at Real Madrid World in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

The coaster was ready to operate in 2020 but its public opening was delayed several years.

The ride opened with Real Madrid World on 9 April 2024.
